title: Hermes Agent is good but, it has one problem...
summary: David Ondrej presents a critical perspective on Hermes Agent, identifying a specific limitation or problem with the system. The video discusses both positive aspects and drawbacks of the Hermes Agent architecture.
writeup: David Ondrej reviews Hermes Agent, a tool tied to multi-agent systems, weighing its strengths against a single limitation he flags as a problem. The assessment is critical rather than promotional, focused on the tool's performance and capabilities. The specific problem is not detailed in the summary.
